message.content:
@startuml
hide footbox
skinparam shadowing false
skinparam sequence {
  ParticipantPadding 60
  BoxPadding 10
  LifeLineBorderColor #000000
  LifeLineBorderThickness 1
  LifeLineBackgroundColor transparent
  ParticipantBorderColor #000000
  ParticipantBackgroundColor #E6E6FA
  ParticipantFontSize 28
  MessageFontSize 28
  MessageThickness 2
  ArrowThickness 2
}

participant "クライアント(ブラウザ)" as C
participant "WebAPサーバ" as W

C -> W : HTTP リクエスト
W -> C : HTTP レスポンス

@enduml
